titleStmt.title: SII 17.313: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 313. (A.R. No. 284 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This record commences with the verse “Ētad-viśvanṛipa-śrēṇi”, etc., and the praśasti “Tirumagaḷ pōla”, etc. It seems to record the gift by the king, of a gold plate (?) which is stated to have been brought by Aḍigaḷ Nakkaṉ, a senior officer (perundaṉam) of the king and the kiḻāṉ of Tiruniyamam in Kiḻār-kkūṟṟam in Rājāśrayavaḷanāḍu and his servant. It also gives a list of a number of other officials among whom is mentioned Mūrkkaṉ Pāṇḍi, the kiḻāṉ of Uṟappaṉṉūr in the services of (paṇimagaṉ) a śiṟudaṉam officer of the king who is stated to be the śrīkāryam officer of this god.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etadviśvanṛpaśreṇi maulimālopalāḷitam .
śāsanam rājarājasya rājakesari varmaṇaḥ .
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉak
ke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kala
maṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷamppāṭiyun taṭi
kaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭu kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻ
tara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉ
ṟit taṇṭāṟkkoṇṭa taṉneḻil vaḷaruḻiyellā yāṇṭun toḻutakai vi
ḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī kovirājarājakecari
paṉmarāṉa śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
maṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭi tiruveṅkaṭa koṭṭa
ttu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭut tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiya mahādevaṟku
cārttiyaruḷa Uṭaiyār śrī rājarājadevar tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷi
ṉa paṭṭaṅkoṭu vanta Uṭaiyār śrī rājarājadevar peruntaṉañ co
ḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai Irājāḻraya vaḷanāṭṭuk kiḷārk kūṟṟat
tut tiruniyamattut tiruniya
maṅkiḻāṉ Aṭikaḷ nakka
ṉum paṇimakaṉ Arumo
ḻiteva vaḷaṉāṭṭut takkaḷur
nāṭṭu brahmateya m Atiyarāja
maṅkalattuc cālāpattiya
ṉ Aṉanta mātevanum de
varkanmikaḷ śivabrāhmaṇaṉ
bhāradvājagottirattu Aṇ
ṇāvaṉ kāḷattiyāṉa ti
rukkāḷatti paṭṭanum Iru
ṅkaṇṭipukaḻipaṭṭanum Iṉṉāṭṭa
varkku kuṉṟavattaṉa koṭ
ṭattu taṇiyal nāṭṭu
brahmadeyam jaṉanātaccatu
rvveti maṅkalattu sa
bhaiyāriṭṭa kara
ṇattāṉ kāśyapa
nāṉa nilacivaṉ
Eṟapaṭṭaṉum I
ttevar śrīkāri
yam Ārāykiṉṟa
Uṭaiyār śrīrājarā
jarājatevar ciṟu
taṉattu paṇimaka
ṉ Uṟuppaṉṉū
r kiḻavaṉ mūrkka
ṉ pāṇṭiyum
tiruveṅkaṭak koṭ
ṭattu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu
mummuṭicoḻapu(ṟa)rat
tu viyāpāri ko
ṟṟuḻāṉ Aiñcoṟṟu
van tanmacilanāṉa puru
ṣamāṇikkac ceṭṭiyu
m meṟpaṭiyūr viyāpāri
kuṟukulapocaṉ vācutevan ca
kuṉiyāna māmaṇṭalak
kavaṟa ceṭṭiyum Omala
van kampaṉ paṭṭālakanā
ṉa tanma ceṭṭiyuṅ kaṭṭi
mān kiḻān kāḷappiriya
num caṅkarappāṭiyān ka
ṇṇan kiranāṉa kuṉṟaimā
yileṭṭiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa nakara
ttārum nakarakkaraṇattā
konāṭṭāṉ
vaṇakkarThe inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.313 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
